summary: Iteration 29: Frontend testing of multi-select and bulk delete features on Assets page. All 7 test cases passed. Features working: checkbox selection on cards, bulk action bar with selected count, 'Sélectionner les 500' link, Cancel button to clear selection, Delete button opens confirmation modal with warning text.
passed_tests: Navigate to /view/engin/index, wait 12s for external API - SUCCESS (500 assets loaded)
Click checkbox on first card (card-select-0), verify it turns blue (selected) - SUCCESS (lta-card--selected class applied, lta-check--on icon visible)
Click checkbox on second card (card-select-1), verify bulk action bar appears with '2 assets sélectionnés' - SUCCESS
Verify 'Sélectionner les 500' link appears in bulk action bar - SUCCESS (data-testid='select-all-filtered')
Click 'Annuler' button to clear selection - SUCCESS (bulk action bar hidden after cancel)
Click 'Supprimer' button to open delete confirmation modal - SUCCESS (data-testid='delete-confirm-modal' appeared)
Verify delete confirmation modal has warning text and Cancel/Delete buttons - SUCCESS (title: 'Confirmer la suppression', warning: 'Cette action est irréversible', buttons: 'Annuler' and 'Supprimer')
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumAssets.jsx: Multi-select implementation is clean with useState for selectedIds (Set)
Selection toggle (toggleSelectItem) correctly adds/removes IDs from Set
Bulk action bar conditionally renders when isSomeSelected is true
Delete confirmation modal uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
handleBulkDelete function properly iterates through selectedIds and calls delete API
All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes: card-select-{i}, bulk-action-bar, bulk-delete-btn, clear-selection-btn, delete-confirm-modal, confirm-delete-btn, select-all-filtered
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 500 assets from external API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 tested multi-select and bulk delete on Assets page (/view/engin/index). All features working: checkbox on each card (data-testid='card-select-{i}'), bulk action bar (data-testid='bulk-action-bar') shows selected count and 'Sélectionner les X' link, Cancel button (data-testid='clear-selection-btn') clears selection, Delete button (data-testid='bulk-delete-btn') opens confirmation modal (data-testid='delete-confirm-modal'). External API loads 500 assets in ~12 seconds. Page starts in grid view mode by default.

checkbox_selection.details: Clicking card-select-{i} toggles selection, applies lta-card--selected class and shows CheckSquare icon (lta-check--on)

bulk_action_bar.details: Appears when 1+ items selected, shows '{n} assets sélectionnés' text

select_all_link.details: 'Sélectionner les 500' link visible in bulk action bar (data-testid='select-all-filtered')

cancel_selection.details: Annuler button (data-testid='clear-selection-btn') clears all selections and hides bulk action bar

delete_button.details: Supprimer button (data-testid='bulk-delete-btn') opens delete confirmation modal

delete_confirmation_modal.details: Modal shows warning icon, 'Confirmer la suppression' title, 'Cette action est irréversible' warning, Annuler and Supprimer buttons

console_warnings_observed: WebSocket connection to external API (omniyat.is-certified.com) failed - expected behavior, does not affect functionality
React warnings about non-boolean attribute 'full' and missing unique keys in PrivateRoutes - minor code quality issues
